GIRA_HORARIO

<thought>

Since I am at the bottom edge, moving forward is blocked by the wall. I need to turn clockwise to face left? Actually, from facing down, turning counter-clockwise makes me face right (`>`), which is the direction toward the goal, even though the immediate adjacent cell is lava and I need to handle that carefully on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

From here, turning clockwise will make me face down, but that is a wall. Turning counter-clockwise will make me face up, which lets me retreat to a safe cell.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO

So I should turn clockwise to face left, but that also does not help.
